app_status.nulltext: ดูทั้งหมด ไม่ต้องเลือก

combo.app_status: 0=ไม่อนุมัติ/1=อนุมัติ/2=รออนุมัติ

root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_type ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.acc_type ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.seq_no ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.bank_old ,pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_m_chg_accno.accno_old , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as accno_old ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.bank_new ,pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_m_chg_accno.accno_new , 'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as accno_new ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.remark ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.entry_date ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.entry_id ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.app_status ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.app_date ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno.app_id
,sc_wef_req_edu.class_type ,sc_wef_req_edu.num_rec
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered ,sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group ,sc_mem_m_chg_accno ,sc_wef_req ,sc_wef_req_edu
WHERE sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chg_accno.membership_no and sc_wef_req.membership_no = sc_mem_m_chg_accno.membership_no and sc_wef_req_edu.requestment_no = sc_wef_req.requestment_no and sc_wef_req_edu.num_rec is not null and sc_wef_req.cancel_status = '0' and sc_wef_req.approve_status= '1' and to_date(sc_mem_m_chg_accno.entry_date) between '!entry_date_1!' and '!entry_date_2!' /*WHERE*/ order by sc_wef_req_edu.class_type ,sc_wef_req_edu.num_rec
